---
title: |
  <img src="../_assets/ahri_logo.png" alt="AHRI logo" class="title-logo" />
  <br />
  CO-LUMINATE Mediation to Outcome Preliminary Analysis
subtitle: "Mediators vs Outcome"
author:
  - name: CO-LUMINATE DSU Team
    affiliation: Africa Health Research Institute (AHRI)
    city: Durban & Somokhele
    country: South Africa
format:
  revealjs:
    controls: true
    progress: true
    slide-number: true
    css:
      - styles/presentation_0.css
      - styles/presentation_1.css
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
read_obj <- function(filename) {
  candidates <- c(
    file.path("..", "_tools", "_objects", filename),
    file.path("_tools", "_objects", filename)
  )
  idx <- which(file.exists(candidates))[1]
  if (is.na(idx)) {
    stop("Missing object file: ", filename)
  }
  candidates[idx]
}

summary_path <- read_obj("mediation_prelim_summary.rds")
interpretation_path <- read_obj("mediation_prelim_interpretation.rds")
build_info_path <- read_obj("mediation_prelim_build_info.rds")
plot_path <- read_obj("mediation_prelim_combined_plot.png")

summary_df <- readRDS(summary_path)
interpretation <- readRDS(interpretation_path)
build_info <- readRDS(build_info_path)
```

## Analysis Scope

-   Objective: assess associations between potential mediators and depression outcome (`DPBN`).
-   Unadjusted model: each mediator fitted independently (bivariate association).
-   Base model: each mediator fitted separately, adjusted for Sex, Age, HIV, visit year, migration, rural residence, and orphanhood.
-   Fully adjusted model: all candidate mediators entered simultaneously with the same covariates.
-   Data source used at build time: private ADaM `dt_multistudies` (no row-level data saved in project objects).

## Model Outputs {.smaller}

```{r}
#| echo: false
summary_display <- data.frame(
  `Potential Mediator` = summary_df$label,
  `Unadjusted OR (95% CI)` = summary_df$unadj_or_ci,
  `Unadjusted p-value` = format.pval(summary_df$unadj_p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001),
  `Base OR (95% CI)` = summary_df$base_or_ci,
  `Base p-value` = format.pval(summary_df$base_p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001),
  `Fully Adjusted OR (95% CI)` = summary_df$adj_or_ci,
  `Fully Adjusted p-value` = format.pval(summary_df$adj_p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001),
  check.names = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(
  summary_display,
  align = c("l", "l", "r", "l", "r", "l", "r"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

## Forest + Pattern Evidence

```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::include_graphics(plot_path)
```

## Interpretation

```{r}
#| echo: false
cat(paste0("- ", interpretation), sep = "\n\n")
```

## Object Governance

-   Script used: `PRJ-CO-LUMINATE/_tools/_scripts/build_mediation_prelim_objects.R`
-   Saved objects: aggregated outcome-association summaries, inter-association/correlation summaries, pattern summaries, and presentation-ready figure.
-   Explicitly excluded from `_tools/_objects`: participant-level datasets and row-level extracts.
-   Build rows analyzed: `r build_info$n_analysis` participants.
